Dear Margaret Wilson,

Thank you for your generous gift of $25,000 to the Riverside Community
Foundation, received on March 14, 2025. Your support of the Clean Water
Initiative means so much to families across Ohio.

We would love to invite you to our spring reception on April 22, 2025.
Please reply to Sarah Chen at s.chen@riversidecf.org or call
(415) 555-0123 to let us know if you can join us.

With gratitude,

David Okafor
Director of Development
Riverside Community Foundation
1200 Lakeshore Drive, Cleveland
